title: cat_jam
description: makes cats jam to the rhythm of music discs :3
body:
🎶 About 🎶

cat_jam is a clientside mod for Fabric, Forge & NeoForge that makes cats jam to the rhythm of music discs :3
Each disc has a set routine so cats will always jam accordingly.
Post any issues or requests on the issues board, or contact me at @shmove on discord. :catjam:

🎼 Compatibility 🎼

cat_jam has basic compatibility with all mods that use the vanilla jukebox, with cats doing a simple all-fitting jam for all unknown tracks. The mods listed here have compatibility either through completely unique and customised jams per disc or through integration with a custom music system.

Discs Where Discs Shouldn't Be
All 14 discs supported. These are some of my favourite modded discs ever, highly recommend!

Alex's Mobs
Both Daze & Thime supported.

Quark
Endermosh supported, and cats ignore ambient discs.

Supplementaries
Both Heave Ho! and the secret disc supported.

AudioPlayer
Cats do a simple all-fitting jam to all custom AudioPlayer discs. (>=1.19.2 only)

🎹 Want custom jams for the discs from your mod? 🎹

Please get in touch! I'd be happy to work on that for you.
You can also try and create the routines yourself and I will gladly add them!

🎬 Previews 🎬

(thank you Jayfrey for this wonderful showcase video!!)
